name: Garden Island
description_short: The Garden Island is a Kauai-based newspaper and news publisher, not a consumer finance company. This listing is miscategorized.
description_long:
The Garden Island is a Hawaii newspaper serving Kauai County, operating as a digital and print news publication. Based on the website content provided, the organization publishes local, state, and national news coverage including politics, business, sports, obituaries, lifestyles, and community information. The publication operates a subscription model for digital and print access to their newspaper content.

The company does not offer any financial services, lending products, credit solutions, or consumer finance tools. There is no evidence of payday loan alternatives, credit union partnerships, employer advance programs, or any products under 36% APR. The website exclusively contains news articles, classified listings, job postings, real estate directories, and newspaper management features (subscription, login, archives).

The Garden Island appears to be a traditional regional newspaper with digital operations. Their revenue model is based on subscriptions, classified advertising, legal notices, job postings, and partner content. They maintain standard newspaper sections and offer email newsletters for news delivery.

This company should not be listed in any consumer finance category on CreditDoc. The categorization as "payday-alternatives" is factually incorrect and represents a database error. The Garden Island is a news media organization with zero relevance to consumer lending, credit, or financial services.
services: Local event calendar and community information
pros: Established local news source for Kauai community
Offers digital and print subscription options for news access
Provides free email newsletters for news delivery
Maintains comprehensive local news coverage across multiple sections
Offers classified services and job listings
cons: Not a financial services company—completely miscategorized
No lending products or credit solutions offered
No consumer finance services of any kind available
Website provides zero information relevant to personal loans, credit alternatives, or emergency cash
Subscription-based paywall limits free content access
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: The Garden Island is a newspaper publisher, not a financial services provider. This listing must be removed from all consumer finance categories as it is factually incorrect and provides no lending, credit, or financial products whatsoever.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
